breakdown.creativeCore: 4-Panel Professional Avatar Grid：Generates a 2x2 grid of photorealistic portraits showing the same person in four different professional and casual outfits.

constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 综合视觉 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: grid, 2x2]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
